articles.title: Monopoly GO! Free Dice Links Today - Updated May 6, 2026
articles.summary: Looking for Monopoly GO! free dice links today ? Reward links are official gift links that give players free dice rolls, event currency, sticker packs, and other limited-time bonuses. Tap a link on your mobile device and the Monopoly GO! app will open automatically to claim the reward. Each link can only be claimed once per account, so if you see a message saying the reward was already claimed, you’ve already used that specific link. Reward links open the Monopoly GO app and add the reward directly to your account when the link is still active and has not already been claimed.

sections.heading: Monopoly GO! Free Dice Links Today
items: Looking for Monopoly GO! free dice links today ? Reward links are official gift links that give players free dice rolls, event currency, sticker packs, and other limited-time bonuses.

Tap a link on your mobile device and the Monopoly GO! app will open automatically to claim the reward. Each link can only be claimed once per account, so if you see a message saying the reward was already claimed, you’ve already used that specific link.

sections.heading: Monopoly GO Reward Link FAQ
items: Reward links open the Monopoly GO app and add the reward directly to your account when the link is still active and has not already been claimed.
Each reward link can only be claimed once per account. If you see this message, you already claimed that specific link.
New links can appear daily, during special events, or around major game updates. Check back often for the latest links.
Yes. While most links include free dice rolls, some may include event currency, sticker packs, or other limited-time rewards.

articles.title: Today's Events (May 06, 2026)
articles.summary: Tournaments are limited-time competitive events in which players strive to collect a special currency through varying methods, detailed within the event's rules accessible via an icon on the screen, to earn prizes and rewards based on milestones and final leaderboard positions. These events are designed to match players of similar levels, affecting the rewards available. Special events happen throughout the day in Monopoly GO! and can help boost your progress. Each event starts and ends at a given time. However, some events have a window where they can start and once you open your app, the cou

sections.heading: Tournaments
items: Tournaments are limited-time competitive events in which players strive to collect a special currency through varying methods, detailed within the event's rules accessible via an icon on the screen, to earn prizes and rewards based on milestones and final leaderboard positions. These events are designed to match players of similar levels, affecting the rewards available.

sections.heading: Special Events
items: Special events happen throughout the day in Monopoly GO! and can help boost your progress. Each event starts and ends at a given time. However, some events have a window where they can start and once you open your app, the countdown until the event ends will begin (usually 30- 60 minutes). This list can help you plan your dice rolls around various events to make the most of your experience.

sections.heading: Quick Wins
items: Quick Wins are daily tasks in Monopoly GO! that offer players various rewards through a set of several challenges that reset daily and a weekly challenge that resets on Mondays. Completing these offers the potential to earn rewards for each task completed and extra rewards for achieving milestones, leading up to a final reward such as a 5 Star Sticker Pack or a WILD STICKER, upon fully filling the progress bar.

articles.title: Villainous Partners: Coming May 2nd
articles.summary: For those new to the game, Partner Events are exclusive to players who have advanced to Board 5 or higher. These events encourage collaborative play, where participants work together to build attractions and earn amazing rewards. You'll use Event tokens (like macarons during past Baking Events) to spin a special wheel, progressing a shared goal. These tokens, which you collect through regular gameplay, are essential for your active involvement. Complete all attractions with your partner to unlock these amazing rewards! Each attraction has 7 possible variations. Here are the milestone rewards f

sections.heading: Villainous Partners
items: For those new to the game, Partner Events are exclusive to players who have advanced to Board 5 or higher. These events encourage collaborative play, where participants work together to build attractions and earn amazing rewards. You'll use Event tokens (like macarons during past Baking Events) to spin a special wheel, progressing a shared goal. These tokens, which you collect through regular gameplay, are essential for your active involvement.

sections.heading: 🏆 Grand Prize Rewards
items: Complete all attractions with your partner to unlock these amazing rewards!

sections.heading: Milestone Rewards
items: Each attraction has 7 possible variations. Here are the milestone rewards for completing each level:
Rolls x 200
Cash
200-300 Rolls
Cash
Cash Boost x 10 minutes
300-500 Rolls
1 x 2 Star 3 Stickers Pack
Mega Heist x 20 minutes
400-600 Rolls
Cash
Builders Bash x 30 minutes
1 x 4 Star 4 Stickers Pack

sections.heading: 💡 Tips for Success
items: Coordinate with your partner: Communication is key to maximizing both players' progress
Plan your dice usage: Save up dice before the event starts for maximum efficiency
Time management: Don't wait until the last minute - partner events require consistent participation
Starting bonus: You'll receive 100 event currency when the event begins

articles.title: Fairytale Partners: Coming April 14th
articles.summary: For those new to the game, Partner Events are exclusive to players who have advanced to Board 5 or higher. These events encourage collaborative play, where participants work together to build attractions and earn amazing rewards. You'll use Event tokens (like macarons during past Baking Events) to spin a special wheel, progressing a shared goal. These tokens, which you collect through regular gameplay, are essential for your active involvement. Complete all attractions with your partner to unlock these amazing rewards! Each attraction has 7 possible variations. Here are the milestone rewards f

sections.heading: Fairytale Partners
items: For those new to the game, Partner Events are exclusive to players who have advanced to Board 5 or higher. These events encourage collaborative play, where participants work together to build attractions and earn amazing rewards. You'll use Event tokens (like macarons during past Baking Events) to spin a special wheel, progressing a shared goal. These tokens, which you collect through regular gameplay, are essential for your active involvement.

sections.heading: 🏆 Grand Prize Rewards
items: Complete all attractions with your partner to unlock these amazing rewards!

sections.heading: Milestone Rewards
items: Each attraction has 7 possible variations. Here are the milestone rewards for completing each level:
Rolls x 200
Cash
200-300 Rolls
Cash
Cash Boost x 10 minutes
300-500 Rolls
1 x 2 Star 3 Stickers Pack
Mega Heist x 20 minutes
400-600 Rolls
Cash
Builders Bash x 30 minutes
1 x 4 Star 4 Stickers Pack

sections.heading: 💡 Tips for Success
items: Coordinate with your partner: Communication is key to maximizing both players' progress
Plan your dice usage: Save up dice before the event starts for maximum efficiency
Time management: Don't wait until the last minute - partner events require consistent participation
Starting bonus: You'll receive 100 event currency when the event begins

These events are designed to match players of similar levels, affecting the rewards available. Special events happen throughout the day in Monopoly GO! and can help boost your progress. sections.heading: Tournaments
items: Tournaments are limited-time competitive events in which players strive to collect a special currency through varying methods, detailed within the event's rules accessible via an icon on the screen, to earn prizes and rewards based on milestones and final leaderboard positions. These events are designed to match players of similar levels, affecting the rewards available.

sections.heading: Special Events
items: Special events happen throughout the day in Monopoly GO! and can help boost your progress. Each event starts and ends at a given time. However, some events have a window where they can start and once you open your app, the countdown until the event ends will begin (usually 30- 60 minutes). This list can help you plan your dice rolls around various events to make the most of your experience.

sections.heading: Quick Wins
items: Quick Wins are daily tasks in Monopoly GO! that offer players various rewards through a set of several challenges that reset daily and a weekly challenge that resets on Mondays. Completing these offers the potential to earn rewards for each task completed and extra rewards for achieving milestones, leading up to a final reward such as a 5 Star Sticker Pack or a WILD STICKER, upon fully filling the progress bar.

articles.title: Monopoly GO! "Monopoly Ever After" Album: Everything You Need to Know
articles.summary: A brand new chapter is about to begin in Monopoly GO!, and this time it’s straight out of a storybook. Monopoly Ever After is the next sticker album, running from April 8th through June 3rd , and it brings a full fairytale theme to the game. Players can expect 24 unique sticker sets inspired by classic stories like Cinderella , Pinocchio , Little Red Riding Hood , and more - along with new features, updated events, and some of the biggest rewards we’ve seen yet.\ At the core of the season is the Monopoly Ever After album , which includes 24 sticker sets packed with familiar characters, magical

sections.heading: 📖 A 24-Set Fairytale Album With Big Rewards
items: At the core of the season is the Monopoly Ever After album , which includes 24 sticker sets packed with familiar characters, magical settings, and collectible rewards.
Completing the full album will earn you:
Puss in Boots Token
15,000 Dice Rolls
Cash rewards to keep progressing
For players who push even further, the Prestige Album offers even bigger rewards, including an additional 15,000 dice and the exclusive Beanstalk Dice ( view here! ) .

As you work through each set, you’ll unlock a mix of rewards like emojis, shields (including the Straw House Shield), and special surprises tied to set completion. Toward the end of the album - especially in Sets 22 and 23 - those rewards get even more exciting, with chances to trigger in-game events like Sticker Boom or High Roller, along with bonus rolls that can hit higher jackpots.

sections.heading: New Gameplay Features This Season
items: Monopoly Ever After introduces several season-exclusive mechanics that completely change how certain parts of the game feel.

sections.heading: 🐷 Fairytale Shut Down
items: Shutdowns now come with a fun twist. Instead of just smashing landmarks, you’ll play a mini hide-and-seek game where hidden piggies appear after a successful attack. Depending on what you uncover, you can earn extra rolls, milestone progress, or tournament points - making Shutdowns much more rewarding than before.

sections.heading: 🪞 Fairytale Heist
items: Bank Heists are also getting upgraded with a magical mirror system. As you reveal doors, you’ll have a chance to uncover hidden gems that increase your final reward. It adds a layer of strategy (and luck) to every heist.

sections.heading: 🎴 Ever After Chance Card
items: A brand new Chance card is being added this season that can instantly send you into either a Shut Down or a Heist. It’s a simple change, but one that keeps gameplay moving faster and adds more unpredictability.

sections.heading: 📚 Enchanted Storybook: A Game-Changing Feature
items: One of the biggest additions this season is the Enchanted Storybook , and it’s easily the most impactful new system for sticker collecting. MOGO Wiki is exclusively revealing some of the details!

Throughout the season, you’ll earn Storybooks by playing events, completing Quick Wins, progressing through Tycoon Express, and more. When you open a Storybook, you’ll receive a sticker pack tied to one of the album’s later sets—but here’s where it gets interesting:
You can actually choose which story (set) you want to target .
That means more control over your sticker progression instead of relying entirely on randomness. And if you change your mind, you can switch to a different story and aim for a different set.
On top of that, each Storybook has a chance to reveal Lucky Fairies , which can grant additional surprise rewards - adding another layer of excitement every time you open one.

sections.heading: 🎮 Fairytale-Themed Events and Minigames
items: All of your favorite Monopoly GO! events are returning, but with a full fairytale makeover.
You’ll see familiar modes like:
Racers , now set in magical storybook worlds
Partners , where you build themed creations together
Treasures , featuring castle exploration and hidden objects
Tycoon Express , reimagined as a storybook journey
There’s also a new addition to Racers called Flag Drop , which lets teams collect extra flags before races to get a head start.

sections.heading: What’s Not Returning This Season
items: To make room for all the new features, a few previous mechanics are taking a break this time around:
Lucky Coin
Style Tokens & Accessories
Community Deluxe Drop
They may return in future seasons, but they won’t be part of Monopoly Ever After.

sections.heading: A New Community Experience
items: This season also introduces Rolling Ever After , a community-driven feature where players help shape an ongoing story by voting on decisions.
As the community makes choices, the story evolves - and players can unlock shared rewards based on those outcomes. It’s a new way to engage with the game outside of just rolling and collecting.

sections.heading: Final Thoughts
items: Monopoly Ever After is shaping up to be one of the most feature-packed albums yet. Between the Enchanted Storybook system , upgraded gameplay mechanics, and a fully themed event lineup, this season gives players more control, more rewards, and more ways to play than ever before.
(Be sure to check out the full list of sticker sets below 👇)

For players who push even further, the Prestige Album offers even bigger rewards, including an additional 15,000 dice and the exclusive Beanstalk Dice ( view here! ) .

As you work through each set, you’ll unlock a mix of rewards like emojis, shields (including the Straw House Shield), and special surprises tied to set completion. Toward the end of the album - especially in Sets 22 and 23 - those rewards get even more exciting, with chances to trigger in-game events like Sticker Boom or High Roller, along with bonus rolls that can hit higher jackpots.

Bank Heists are also getting upgraded with a magical mirror system. As you reveal doors, you’ll have a chance to uncover hidden gems that increase your final reward. It adds a layer of strategy (and luck) to every heist.

Each level presents a grid where you'll use Pickaxes (earned through regular gameplay) to uncover valuable rewards. The strategic element comes from knowing the minimum number of pickaxes needed to guarantee finding all treasures on each level, helping you plan your approach and maximize your rewards efficiently. articles.title: Upcoming Album: Monopoly Ever After
articles.summary: A brand new album is on the horizon, and this one is straight out of your favorite storybooks 📖! MOGO Wiki is exclusively revealing it, and we'll have more details over the coming days! 🗓️ April 8th - June 3rd Step into Monopoly Ever After , a magical season packed with iconic fairy tale characters and stories - from Cinderella and Pinocchio to Little Red Riding Hood and more. sections.heading: 🎉 Themed Events & Minigames

🚂 Fairytale Express

Expect a full season of new minigames, themed challenges, and magical rewards .
With new mechanics, stunning themed sets, and tons of ways to earn rewards, Monopoly Ever After will be quite the album for those who love a fairy tale!
Stay tuned - more guides, sticker lists, and tips coming soon!

sections.heading: Tournaments
items: Tournaments are limited-time competitive events in which players strive to collect a special currency through varying methods, detailed within the event's rules accessible via an icon on the screen, to earn prizes and rewards based on milestones and final leaderboard positions. These events are designed to match players of similar levels, affecting the rewards available.

sections.heading: Special Events
items: Special events happen throughout the day in Monopoly GO! and can help boost your progress. Each event starts and ends at a given time. However, some events have a window where they can start and once you open your app, the countdown until the event ends will begin (usually 30- 60 minutes). This list can help you plan your dice rolls around various events to make the most of your experience.

sections.heading: Quick Wins
items: Quick Wins are daily tasks in Monopoly GO! that offer players various rewards through a set of several challenges that reset daily and a weekly challenge that resets on Mondays. Completing these offers the potential to earn rewards for each task completed and extra rewards for achieving milestones, leading up to a final reward such as a 5 Star Sticker Pack or a WILD STICKER, upon fully filling the progress bar.

articles.title: Roll Treasures: Coming March 8th
articles.summary: Treasure Hunt events in Monopoly GO! challenge players to dig for hidden treasures across multiple levels. Each level presents a grid where you'll use Pickaxes (earned through regular gameplay) to uncover valuable rewards. The strategic element comes from knowing the minimum number of pickaxes needed to guarantee finding all treasures on each level, helping you plan your approach and maximize your rewards efficiently. articles.title: Hello Kitty Partners: Coming March 10th
articles.summary: For those new to the game, Partner Events are exclusive to players who have advanced to Board 5 or higher. These events encourage collaborative play, where participants work together to build attractions and earn amazing rewards. You'll use Event tokens (like macarons during past Baking Events) to spin a special wheel, progressing a shared goal. These tokens, which you collect through regular gameplay, are essential for your active involvement. Complete all attractions with your partner to unlock these amazing rewards! Each attraction has 7 possible variations. Here are the milestone rewards f

sections.heading: Hello Kitty Partners
items: For those new to the game, Partner Events are exclusive to players who have advanced to Board 5 or higher. These events encourage collaborative play, where participants work together to build attractions and earn amazing rewards. You'll use Event tokens (like macarons during past Baking Events) to spin a special wheel, progressing a shared goal. These tokens, which you collect through regular gameplay, are essential for your active involvement.

sections.heading: 🏆 Grand Prize Rewards
items: Complete all attractions with your partner to unlock these amazing rewards!

sections.heading: Milestone Rewards
items: Each attraction has 7 possible variations. Here are the milestone rewards for completing each level:
Rolls x 200
Cash
200-300 Rolls
Cash
Cash Boost x 10 minutes
300-500 Rolls
1 x 2 Star 3 Stickers Pack
Mega Heist x 20 minutes
400-600 Rolls
Cash
1 x EmojiPack_Hotcake_Emoji_04
1 x 4 Star 4 Stickers Pack

sections.heading: 💡 Tips for Success
items: Coordinate with your partner: Communication is key to maximizing both players' progress
Plan your dice usage: Save up dice before the event starts for maximum efficiency
Time management: Don't wait until the last minute - partner events require consistent participation
Starting bonus: You'll receive 100 event currency when the event begins

sections.heading: Tournaments
items: Tournaments are limited-time competitive events in which players strive to collect a special currency through varying methods, detailed within the event's rules accessible via an icon on the screen, to earn prizes and rewards based on milestones and final leaderboard positions. These events are designed to match players of similar levels, affecting the rewards available.

sections.heading: Special Events
items: Special events happen throughout the day in Monopoly GO! and can help boost your progress. Each event starts and ends at a given time. However, some events have a window where they can start and once you open your app, the countdown until the event ends will begin (usually 30- 60 minutes). This list can help you plan your dice rolls around various events to make the most of your experience.

sections.heading: Quick Wins
items: Quick Wins are daily tasks in Monopoly GO! that offer players various rewards through a set of several challenges that reset daily and a weekly challenge that resets on Mondays. Completing these offers the potential to earn rewards for each task completed and extra rewards for achieving milestones, leading up to a final reward such as a 5 Star Sticker Pack or a WILD STICKER, upon fully filling the progress bar.

articles.title: Valentines Treasures: Coming February 11th
articles.summary: Treasure Hunt events in Monopoly GO! challenge players to dig for hidden treasures across multiple levels. Each level presents a grid where you'll use Pickaxes (earned through regular gameplay) to uncover valuable rewards. The strategic element comes from knowing the minimum number of pickaxes needed to guarantee finding all treasures on each level, helping you plan your approach and maximize your rewards efficiently. articles.title: Pet Show Partners: Coming February 17th
articles.summary: For those new to the game, Partner Events are exclusive to players who have advanced to Board 5 or higher. These events encourage collaborative play, where participants work together to build attractions and earn amazing rewards. You'll use Event tokens (like macarons during past Baking Events) to spin a special wheel, progressing a shared goal. These tokens, which you collect through regular gameplay, are essential for your active involvement. Complete all attractions with your partner to unlock these amazing rewards! Each attraction has 7 possible variations. Here are the milestone rewards f

sections.heading: Pet Show Partners
items: For those new to the game, Partner Events are exclusive to players who have advanced to Board 5 or higher. These events encourage collaborative play, where participants work together to build attractions and earn amazing rewards. You'll use Event tokens (like macarons during past Baking Events) to spin a special wheel, progressing a shared goal. These tokens, which you collect through regular gameplay, are essential for your active involvement.

sections.heading: 🏆 Grand Prize Rewards
items: Complete all attractions with your partner to unlock these amazing rewards!

sections.heading: Milestone Rewards
items: Each attraction has 7 possible variations. Here are the milestone rewards for completing each level:
Rolls x 200
Cash
200-300 Rolls
Cash
Cash Boost x 10 minutes
300-500 Rolls
1 x 2 Star 3 Stickers Pack
Mega Heist x 20 minutes
400-600 Rolls
Cash
Builders Bash x 30 minutes
1 x 4 Star 4 Stickers Pack

sections.heading: 💡 Tips for Success
items: Coordinate with your partner: Communication is key to maximizing both players' progress
Plan your dice usage: Save up dice before the event starts for maximum efficiency
Time management: Don't wait until the last minute - partner events require consistent participation
Starting bonus: You'll receive 100 event currency when the event begins

articles.title: Inside Posh Pets: New Features, Rewards, and How This Album Works
articles.summary: A brand-new album is almost here, and Posh Pets is shaping up to be one of the most unique seasons MONOPOLY GO! has seen yet. Launching on February 4th , this album isn’t just about collecting stickers - it introduces new customization features, community-driven content, and season-long rewards that carry forward even after the album ends. If you’re coming from recent albums, Posh Pets is a bit different. Instead of focusing on a long list of new minigames or sticker packs, this season leans heavily into personalization, creativity, and community participation. Here’s what to expect. The headl

sections.heading: Style Tokens: The Big New Feature This Season 🎩
items: The headline addition in Posh Pets is the introduction of Style Tokens - a brand-new type of token that you can customize throughout the season. Unlike traditional tokens, Style Tokens allow you to change how they look using cosmetic accessories earned through gameplay and trading.
Each Style Token includes three cosmetic slots:
Top (hats, crowns, headwear)
Middle (scarves, necklaces, collars)
Base (platforms, props, themed bases)

Accessories are earned primarily through Accessory Stickers , which appear in select album sets, sticker packs, Quick Wins, and via trading with other players. These changes are purely cosmetic and do not affect gameplay or bonuses - they’re all about expression and showing off your style on the board.
Once the Posh Pets album ends, your Style Token’s final look is locked in permanently and carries forward into future seasons, making your choices this month extra meaningful.

sections.heading: A More Personal Album: Community Pet Stickers 🖼️
items: Posh Pets also features a special Community Gallery set, made up of real pets submitted by players. After reviewing thousands of entries, a small group of community pets were selected by Scopely and transformed into in-game stickers.
It’s a fun, feel-good addition that gives this album a more personal touch - and one that’s likely to be a favorite set for collectors and traders alike.

sections.heading: Hello Kitty & Friends: A Special Album Highlight 🎀
items: One of the most talked-about additions to Posh Pets is the Hello Kitty & Friends sticker set. This collaboration is exclusive to this album and comes with two collectible shield rewards:
Complete the set once to unlock the Hello Kitty Shield
Complete it a second time to earn the Gold Hello Kitty Shield
This makes Hello Kitty & Friends one of the most rewarding single sets in the album, especially for players who enjoy chasing cosmetic collectibles and prestige rewards.

sections.heading: Trading, Duplicates, and Why This Season Rewards Teamwork 🔄
items: Accessories in Posh Pets can only be equipped at the moment you receive them , which means duplicates are more valuable than ever. Trading plays a major role this season - whether you’re hunting for a specific accessory, trying to equip multiple Style Tokens, or completing high-demand sets.
If you enjoy trading events, coordinating with friends, or optimizing duplicates, this album strongly rewards that playstyle.

Sticker Finder can help you track down the exact stickers and accessories you’re missing. Sticker Finder shows you players who have what you need, making it easier to complete sets, chase duplicates, and unlock more Style Token combinations.

In the MOGO Wiki Tools mobile app, you can try Sticker Finder with a free Insider trial . Prefer using the web instead? New Insiders get 50% off their first month , making it easier than ever to trade smarter during Posh Pets.

sections.heading: Play With Purpose: A Season That Gives Back ❤️
items: Beyond stickers and customization, Posh Pets also introduces a season-long community goal focused on supporting animal welfare organizations. By simply playing the game and passing GO, players collectively contribute toward real-world donations tied to the season’s progress.
It’s a reminder that this album is about more than style - it’s about celebrating pets and giving back as a community.

sections.heading: What This Means for Players
items: If you’re deciding how much to invest in Posh Pets, here’s the short version:
Expect fewer new mechanics, but deeper customization
Trading and duplicates matter more than usual
Cosmetic rewards this season have long-term value
Community participation plays a bigger role than ever
Whether you’re here for customization, collecting, trading, or just enjoying a more relaxed and expressive season, Posh Pets offers something a little different - and a lot more personal.
Be sure to check out the full sticker list below before the season goes live on February 4th .

articles.title: Upcoming Album: Posh Pets
articles.summary: Get ready to pamper your collection - Posh Pets , the next MONOPOLY GO! album, is officially on the way! The Posh Pets album kicks off February 4 , immediately after the Harry Potter GO! album wraps up, and will run all the way through April 8 . This season is packed with stylish rewards, brand-new customization options, and plenty of events to keep Tycoons busy. Posh Pets features a total of 25 sticker sets , including one Prestige set that unlocks only after you complete the album for the first time. As usual, completing sets will earn you a wide range of rewards - and this album does not di

sections.heading: Album Overview
items: Posh Pets features a total of 25 sticker sets , including one Prestige set that unlocks only after you complete the album for the first time. As usual, completing sets will earn you a wide range of rewards - and this album does not disappoint.

sections.heading: What you can expect:
items: Over 16,000 Dice total from set completions
Tons of Tokens , Shields , and other collectibles
A full Prestige set for dedicated completists
If you’re aiming for maximum dice and cosmetics, this is an album you won’t want to skip.

sections.heading: New Feature: Style Tokens
items: Posh Pets introduces an exciting new collectible type: Style Tokens .

Style Tokens are special tokens you can customize with accessories throughout the season. For example, you might unlock a cat-themed Style Token and then add a hat, accessory, or other cosmetic flair to personalize it.

sections.heading: How Style Tokens work:
items: 🎨 Earn Style Tokens during the album
🎁 Find Accessories in sticker packs and through trading
🔁 Accessories can be equipped, swapped, or discarded
♻️ Discarded accessories aren’t gone forever - you can find them again via packs and trades
🔓 Accessories can be used across multiple Style Tokens
Style Tokens are yours to keep, so you can mix and match your favorite accessories before the album season ends.
Some sticker packs this season will even guarantee an accessory, making customization a core part of the album experience.

sections.heading: Events Coming During Posh Pets
items: As always, the album season will be supported by a rotating lineup of themed events, including:
💘 Valentine’s Treasures
🥣 Pet Bowl Racers
🐶 Pet Show Partners
…and more surprises throughout the season
These events will offer additional chances to earn stickers, accessories, dice, and exclusive rewards tied to the Posh Pets theme.

album.name: Posh Pets
rewards: Over 16,000 Dice total from set completions
If you’re aiming for maximum dice and cosmetics, this is an album you won’t want to skip.

sections.heading: Event Details
items: No empty spins - every participant wins something.

items: Updates, sticker trading, daily events and free dice for Monopoly GO!

sections.heading: ⚠️ Important Disclaimers
items: All prizes are delivered instantly via redemption code , displayed upon winning. Be sure to copy your code right away , as codes cannot be re-issued or retrieved later.

Items not claiming? Ensure you're logged in, and try re-logging in if necessary. Additionally, content-blocking extensions may cause issues.

items: Tournaments are limited-time competitive events in which players strive to collect a special currency through varying methods, detailed within the event's rules accessible via an icon on the screen, to earn prizes and rewards based on milestones and final leaderboard positions. These events are designed to match players of similar levels, affecting the rewards available.

sections.heading: Special Events
items: Special events happen throughout the day in Monopoly GO! and can help boost your progress. Each event starts and ends at a given time. However, some events have a window where they can start and once you open your app, the countdown until the event ends will begin (usually 30- 60 minutes). This list can help you plan your dice rolls around various events to make the most of your experience.

sections.heading: Quick Wins
items: Quick Wins are daily tasks in Monopoly GO! that offer players various rewards through a set of several challenges that reset daily and a weekly challenge that resets on Mondays. Completing these offers the potential to earn rewards for each task completed and extra rewards for achieving milestones, leading up to a final reward such as a 5 Star Sticker Pack or a WILD STICKER, upon fully filling the progress bar.

articles.title: Toyshop Partners: Coming December 23rd
articles.summary: For those new to the game, Partner Events are exclusive to players who have advanced to Board 5 or higher. These events encourage collaborative play, where participants work together to build attractions and earn amazing rewards. You'll use Event tokens (like macarons during past Baking Events) to spin a special wheel, progressing a shared goal. These tokens, which you collect through regular gameplay, are essential for your active involvement. Complete all attractions with your partner to unlock these amazing rewards! Each attraction has 7 possible variations. Here are the milestone rewards f

sections.heading: Toyshop Partners
items: For those new to the game, Partner Events are exclusive to players who have advanced to Board 5 or higher. These events encourage collaborative play, where participants work together to build attractions and earn amazing rewards. You'll use Event tokens (like macarons during past Baking Events) to spin a special wheel, progressing a shared goal. These tokens, which you collect through regular gameplay, are essential for your active involvement.

sections.heading: 🏆 Grand Prize Rewards
items: Complete all attractions with your partner to unlock these amazing rewards!

sections.heading: Milestone Rewards
items: Each attraction has 7 possible variations. Here are the milestone rewards for completing each level:
Rolls x 200
Cash
200-300 Rolls
Cash
Cash Boost x 10 minutes
300-500 Rolls
1 x 2 Star 3 Stickers Pack
Mega Heist x 20 minutes
400-600 Rolls
Cash
Builders Bash x 30 minutes
1 x 4 Star 4 Stickers Pack

sections.heading: 💡 Tips for Success
items: Coordinate with your partner: Communication is key to maximizing both players' progress
Plan your dice usage: Save up dice before the event starts for maximum efficiency
Time management: Don't wait until the last minute - partner events require consistent participation
Starting bonus: You'll receive 100 event currency when the event begins

articles.title: Cash Treasures: Coming December 14th
articles.summary: Treasure Hunt events in Monopoly GO! challenge players to dig for hidden treasures across multiple levels. Each level presents a grid where you'll use Pickaxes (earned through regular gameplay) to uncover valuable rewards. The strategic element comes from knowing the minimum number of pickaxes needed to guarantee finding all treasures on each level, helping you plan your approach and maximize your rewards efficiently. articles.title: Exclusive: Monopoly GO!’s Next Album Is… Harry Potter GO!
articles.summary: Everything we’ve discovered so far from the newly-found public asset files. The magic is officially coming to Monopoly GO! We’ve dug through the newly updated public asset files - and what we found is HUGE: the next full sticker album will be a Harry Potter–themed crossover , and it is massive . That’s right: an entire “ Harry Potter GO! ” album is on the way, complete with iconic characters, Hogwarts-themed boards, magical partner events, and more collectibles than we’ve ever seen in a single season.

sections.heading: A Fully Magical Album: Harry, Hermione, Ron & More
items: The assets show dozens of references to characters from across the movies and books - including Harry , Hermione , Ron , and many other instantly recognizable Wizarding World favorites.

Based on how these albums work, we can expect each sticker set to represent scenes, moments, artifacts, magical creatures, and iconic items from the franchise. Think spells, flying broomsticks, magical beasts, and fan-favorite moments.
This is easily one of the largest and most ambitious themed albums Scopely has ever produced.

sections.heading: New Events: Wizarding World Style
items: Several new partner events appear to be in the works, including:
Wizarding World Partners
A magical twist on traditional Partner Events - likely with house-themed visuals and Hogwarts-inspired attractions.
And even more magical racer events are coming to Monopoly GO!
🏎️ Hogwarts Racers
🏦 Gringotts Racers
🏆 Quidditch Racers
And, of course, Harry Potter-themed treasure hunts are headed our way:
Hogwarts Treasures
Expect magical chests, glowing keys, wand sparkles, and maybe even Sorting Hat animations.

sections.heading: New League Season: Aboard the Hogwarts Express
items: One of the most exciting finds: a brand new league season themed entirely around the Hogwarts Express .
This could include:
Hogwarts Express themed train
themed banners
unique leaderboard frames
This may be one of the most visually impressive league seasons so far.

sections.heading: New Tokens, Shields, Dice & More
items: As always, a new album means tons of new collectibles - and these look especially cool.
From what we can see in the files, players will be getting:
New tokens (likely house mascots, wands, potions, owls, etc.)
New shields (House crests?)
Themed dice - possibly glowing, magical, or spell-infused
House-specific Prize Drops for Gryffindor, Slytherin, Hufflepuff, and Ravenclaw
If Scopely leans into full house representation, this could be one of the most immersive crossovers the game has ever had.

sections.heading: New Limited Boards
items: Just like the Cozy Comforts and prior seasonal boards, this album will include fully themed, limited-time boards:
Hogwarts
Diagon Alley
Hogsmeade
These appear to have unique decorations, special animations, and custom board configurations.
This is a huge deal for decoration collectors and cosmetic completionists.

sections.heading: Want to be in the loop?
items: Updates, sticker trading, daily events and free dice for Monopoly GO!
No spam. Unsubscribe anytime.

sections.heading: This Might Be the Biggest Crossover in Monopoly GO! History
items: Albums already drive massive player engagement - but combining Monopoly GO! with one of the biggest global fandoms ever?
That’s the kind of event that brings everyone back to grinding, trading, and pushing for completion.
We’re extremely excited to see how Scopely launches this one, and we’ll be covering every detail as we gather more information.
Ready for more? We'll be dropping previews of the stickers later this week, so keep checking our blog for more info!

articles.summary: Get ready to feast - the Bon Appétit album is almost here! Launching August 27th and running through October 15th, this food-themed sticker album is serving up 21 delicious sets, including 2 Prestige sets that unlock only after your first full completion. Finish the album once and you’ll earn a mouthwatering reward: 15,000 dice rolls , the exclusive Tickin’ Chicken token , and a generous helping of in-game cash!

articles.title: ☀️ Summer Escape Album – Your Next Sticker Adventure Begins!
articles.summary: Pack your sunscreen, roll the dice, and get ready for a tropical takeover in MONOPOLY GO! The Summer Escape album arrives July 2nd at 1:00 PM EST , right as the Star Wars GO! album ends, and it’s here to bring warm vibes and cool rewards all summer long. 🌴🍹 This brand-new seasonal album introduces 23 unique sticker sets , filled with beachy themes, vacation fun, and seasonal surprises. Collect stickers, complete sets, and trade your way to the top in this sunny celebration of summer. Whether you’re a casual collector or an album completionist, Summer Escape is designed to reward every type of

sections.heading: 🌊 What is the Summer Escape Album?
items: This brand-new seasonal album introduces 23 unique sticker sets , filled with beachy themes, vacation fun, and seasonal surprises. Collect stickers, complete sets, and trade your way to the top in this sunny celebration of summer.
Whether you’re a casual collector or an album completionist, Summer Escape is designed to reward every type of player. And if you’re aiming to complete it all? The rewards are hotter than ever.

sections.heading: 🎁 Album Rewards Overview
items: Album Completion Reward: 💰 Monopoly Cash + 15,000 Dice Rolls
Set Rewards (Combined Total): 🎲 17,800 Dice Rolls
Total Possible Rewards: 🌟 Over 32,000 dice rolls + cash for full album completion
Sets: 23 total, including 3 Prestige Sets for the pros out there
Want to view all 200+ stickers? View them right here in MOGO Wiki Tools!

sections.heading: 🔁 Sticker Trading & Events
items: Expect a full calendar of events, Golden Blitzes, tournaments, and more to help you track down those elusive stickers. And don’t worry - Sticker Finder is here to help you make trades faster and smarter than ever. Stay tuned to MOGO Wiki Tools for all daily event updates, Golden Blitz announcements, and free reward links.

sections.heading: 💡 Pro Tip:
items: Use the app’s Favorites feature in the Wiki tab to track which sticker sets you’re working on. And be sure to rate your trades in Sticker Finder to build your profile and make future swaps even easier.

sections.heading: 🌟 Why We’re Excited
items: Summer Escape is the perfect cooldown after the galaxy-sized adventure of Star Wars GO! With vibrant visuals, lighter themes, and a steady stream of rewards, it’s shaping up to be one of the most accessible and rewarding albums yet.
Get a head start by downloading the free MOGO Wiki Tools app – the #1 companion app for MONOPOLY GO! It features:
Real-time sticker trading with Sticker Finder
Daily event and tournament calendars
Upcoming Golden Blitz notifications
Partner Finder tools
And more summer updates coming soon…
Let’s make this summer one to remember – see you in the waves, Tycoons! 🏄‍♂️🌞

articles.title: Movie Night Has Arrived!
articles.summary: This thrilling new collection is a tribute to the most legendary movie genres in cinematic history. Over the course of 56 days, Tycoons will have the opportunity to explore and build a Sticker collection that showcases iconic film tropes and clichés that have shaped the silver screen. No blockbuster is complete without an epic finale, and the Movie Night Album delivers in full force. Tycoons can look forward to earning the Scottie Award Token ( view here ), 12,000 Rolls, and Money to build their landmarks by completing the Album. For the first time, Scopely is introducing a Signature Dice as a

sections.heading: What has changed?
items: For the first time, Scopely is introducing a Signature Dice as a top-tier reward in the Prestige Album , replacing the Gold Token. This means you’ll roll in style with a one-of-a-kind collectible Dice!
The first Vault has been rebalanced increasing the Rolls to 250 and removing the 3-Star Pack, while the second and third tiers have remained the same. Here’s the breakdown chart of the tiers:
View the whole collection here , only on MOGO Wiki Tools! Don't fall behind - start finding those trades early using Sticker Finder!

album.name: Movie Night Has Arrived!
rewards: No blockbuster is complete without an epic finale, and the Movie Night Album delivers in full force. Tycoons can look forward to earning the Scottie Award Token ( view here ), 12,000 Rolls, and Money to build their landmarks by completing the Album.

For the first time, Scopely is introducing a Signature Dice as a top-tier reward in the Prestige Album , replacing the Gold Token. This means you’ll roll in style with a one-of-a-kind collectible Dice!

articles.title: Next Album: Movie Night and 5-Star Sticker Giveaway
articles.summary: The Artful Tales album is wrapping up soon, and that means it’s time for a sneak peek at the next album! Movie Night kicks off on March 6th and runs through May 1st, 2025 . This album will feature 20 sets (including 2 prestige sets ) and a total of 180 stickers . While it’s another shorter album, we’re hoping for a longer one this summer! Stay tuned for updates on completion rewards, new tokens, and shields - there’s so much to look forward to!

sections.heading: 🎟 Preview All 20 Sets & 180 Stickers Now!
items: Want an early look at Movie Night ? The MOGO Wiki has all 20 sets and 180 stickers available to browse right here, right now !

sections.heading: How to View the New Album:
items: 1️⃣ Download MOGO Wiki Tools from your app store. 2️⃣ Open the app and tap “Wiki” in the bottom menu. 3️⃣ Select “Sticker Albums” , then Movie Night to explore every set and sticker!
🔎 Even better? You can view most tokens and shields in 3D , making it easier to appreciate all the details Scopely puts into these collectibles!
💡 See something missing or incorrect? Help improve the Wiki by suggesting an edit - just tap “Suggest Edit” when viewing an item!

sections.heading: 📢 New Feature: Sticker Sheets!

You can customize your Sticker Sheet to:
🎨 Show Missing Stickers , Extras , Giveaways , or any theme you like! 🖌️ Change backgrounds & title colors to match your style. 📲 Share it anywhere- Facebook, Discord, Instagram, and more!
📍 Find it in the Sticker Finder tab in MOGO Wiki Tools. This feature is FREE for everyone , Insiders and non-Insiders alike!

articles.title: Get Ready for the Next Album: Artful Tales
articles.summary: Even though Jingle Joy still has a few weeks left, it’s time to get excited for the next sticker album: Artful Tales ! This art-themed adventure launches on January 16th, 2025 , right after Jingle Joy wraps up, and runs until March 6th, 2025 . Packed with creativity, stunning designs, and incredible rewards, this album is one you won’t want to miss! Artful Tales features: 22 sticker sets , including 5 prestige sets .

sections.heading: Album Overview
items: Artful Tales features:
22 sticker sets , including 5 prestige sets .
A total of 198 stickers , with 40 gold stickers across both normal and prestige sets.
Begin with 17 sets and unlock the remaining 5 after completing the album the first time.
Dive into the details of every sticker and set , plus upcoming rewards, by visiting the Wiki section in the MOGO Wiki Tools app !

sections.heading: Album Completion Rewards
items: Big rewards await those who complete the album multiple times. Here’s what you’ll earn:
First Completion: 10,000 rolls, Cash, and the Visual Virtuoso Token .
Second Completion: 10,000 rolls, Cash, and the Golden Virtuoso Token .
Third Completion: 10,000 rolls and Cash.

sections.heading: Special Set Rewards
items: In addition to dice for each set, several sets include extra bonus rewards:
Set 8: Jon Bob Ross Emoji .
Set 11: Man with Earring Shield .
Set 15: Artist Hazel Token .
With these rewards, completing Artful Tales will be as rewarding as it is fun!

sections.heading: Still Working on Jingle Joy? We’ve Got You Covered!
items: If you’re still working to finish the Jingle Joy album, the MOGO Wiki Tools is here to help! MOGO Wiki Tools is available on both desktop and your mobile device.
Join free sticker giveaways to snag the stickers you need.
Insiders (also available with a 3-day free trial via mobile app ) can use Sticker Finder to connect with thousands of players and make trades with ease.
Become an Insider today and make the most of your Monopoly GO! journey.
Once the Season ends, your extra stars will be converted to rolls! The maximum conversion will be 700+ stars for 750 rolls!
Let’s get ready to bring the art to life with Artful Tales ! 🎨

album.name: Artful Tales
rewards: First Completion: 10,000 rolls, Cash, and the Visual Virtuoso Token .
Second Completion: 10,000 rolls, Cash, and the Golden Virtuoso Token .
Third Completion: 10,000 rolls and Cash.
In addition to dice for each set, several sets include extra bonus rewards:
Set 8: Jon Bob Ross Emoji .
Set 11: Man with Earring Shield .
Set 15: Artist Hazel Token .

events.name: Cash Boost
events.description: Looking to win some free stickers? The Magic Hunt is officially on! Exclusively on MonopolyGO.wiki's website (not the app), you can hunt down several magic-themed objects for a chance to spin the wheel of prizes! Check it out right here ! Tournaments are limited-time competitive events in which players strive to collect a special currency through varying methods, detailed within the event's rules accessible via an icon on the screen, to earn prizes and rewards based on milestones and final leaderboard positions. These events are designed to match players of similar levels, affecting the reward

events.name: Dig Minigame（Sticker Treasures）
events.description: Treasure Hunt events in Monopoly GO! challenge players to dig for hidden treasures across multiple levels. Each level presents a grid where you'll use Pickaxes (earned through regular gameplay) to uncover valuable rewards. The strategic element comes from knowing the minimum number of pickaxes needed to guarantee finding all treasures on each level, helping you plan your approach and maximize your rewards efficiently. Here are the main rewards you can earn throughout this treasure hunt: Complete breakdown of every level, including grid size, minimum pickaxes needed, and completion rewards:

events.name: Dig Minigame（Cash Treasures）
events.description: Treasure Hunt events in Monopoly GO! challenge players to dig for hidden treasures across multiple levels. Each level presents a grid where you'll use Pickaxes (earned through regular gameplay) to uncover valuable rewards. The strategic element comes from knowing the minimum number of pickaxes needed to guarantee finding all treasures on each level, helping you plan your approach and maximize your rewards efficiently. events.description: Treasure Hunt events in Monopoly GO! challenge players to dig for hidden treasures across multiple levels. Each level presents a grid where you'll use Pickaxes (earned through regular gameplay) to uncover valuable rewards. The strategic element comes from knowing the minimum number of pickaxes needed to guarantee finding all treasures on each level, helping you plan your approach and maximize your rewards efficiently. events.name: Partner Event（Toyshop Partners）
events.description: For those new to the game, Partner Events are exclusive to players who have advanced to Board 5 or higher. These events encourage collaborative play, where participants work together to build attractions and earn amazing rewards. You'll use Event tokens (like macarons during past Baking Events) to spin a special wheel, progressing a shared goal. These tokens, which you collect through regular gameplay, are essential for your active involvement. Complete all attractions with your partner to unlock these amazing rewards! events.name: Dig Minigame（Cash Treasures）
events.description: Treasure Hunt events in Monopoly GO! challenge players to dig for hidden treasures across multiple levels. Each level presents a grid where you'll use Pickaxes (earned through regular gameplay) to uncover valuable rewards. The strategic element comes from knowing the minimum number of pickaxes needed to guarantee finding all treasures on each level, helping you plan your approach and maximize your rewards efficiently. Here are the main rewards you can earn throughout this treasure hunt: Complete breakdown of every level, including grid size, minimum pickaxes needed, and completion rewards:

events.name: Dig Minigame（Roll Treasures）
events.description: Treasure Hunt events in Monopoly GO! challenge players to dig for hidden treasures across multiple levels. Each level presents a grid where you'll use Pickaxes (earned through regular gameplay) to uncover valuable rewards. The strategic element comes from knowing the minimum number of pickaxes needed to guarantee finding all treasures on each level, helping you plan your approach and maximize your rewards efficiently. You'll use Event tokens (like macarons during past Baking Events) to spin a special wheel, progressing a shared goal. These events are designed to match players of similar levels, affecting the rewards available. Special events happen throughout the day in Monopoly GO! and can help boost your progress. events.name: Posh Pets
events.description: Get ready to pamper your collection - Posh Pets , the next MONOPOLY GO! album, is officially on the way! The Posh Pets album kicks off February 4 , immediately after the Harry Potter GO! album wraps up, and will run all the way through April 8 . This season is packed with stylish rewards, brand-new customization options, and plenty of events to keep Tycoons busy. Posh Pets features a total of 25 sticker sets , including one Prestige set that unlocks only after you complete the album for the first time. As usual, completing sets will earn you a wide range of rewards - and this album does not di

events.name: Partner Event（Pet Show Partners）
events.description: For those new to the game, Partner Events are exclusive to players who have advanced to Board 5 or higher. These events encourage collaborative play, where participants work together to build attractions and earn amazing rewards. You'll use Event tokens (like macarons during past Baking Events) to spin a special wheel, progressing a shared goal. These tokens, which you collect through regular gameplay, are essential for your active involvement. Complete all attractions with your partner to unlock these amazing rewards! Each attraction has 7 possible variations. Here are the milestone rewards f

events.name: Dig Minigame（Cash Treasures）
events.description: Treasure Hunt events in Monopoly GO! challenge players to dig for hidden treasures across multiple levels. Each level presents a grid where you'll use Pickaxes (earned through regular gameplay) to uncover valuable rewards. The strategic element comes from knowing the minimum number of pickaxes needed to guarantee finding all treasures on each level, helping you plan your approach and maximize your rewards efficiently. events.name: Dig Minigame（Roll Treasures）
events.description: Treasure Hunt events in Monopoly GO! challenge players to dig for hidden treasures across multiple levels. Each level presents a grid where you'll use Pickaxes (earned through regular gameplay) to uncover valuable rewards. The strategic element comes from knowing the minimum number of pickaxes needed to guarantee finding all treasures on each level, helping you plan your approach and maximize your rewards efficiently. Here are the main rewards you can earn throughout this treasure hunt: Complete breakdown of every level, including grid size, minimum pickaxes needed, and completion rewards:

events.name: Partner Event（Hello Kitty Partners）
events.description: For those new to the game, Partner Events are exclusive to players who have advanced to Board 5 or higher. These events encourage collaborative play, where participants work together to build attractions and earn amazing rewards. You'll use Event tokens (like macarons during past Baking Events) to spin a special wheel, progressing a shared goal. These tokens, which you collect through regular gameplay, are essential for your active involvement. Complete all attractions with your partner to unlock these amazing rewards! Each attraction has 7 possible variations. Here are the milestone rewards f

These events encourage collaborative play, where participants work together to build attractions and earn amazing rewards. You'll use Event tokens (like macarons during past Baking Events) to spin a special wheel, progressing a shared goal. These tokens, which you collect through regular gameplay, are essential for your active involvement. Complete all attractions with your partner to unlock these amazing rewards! events.name: Tycoon Class
events.description: Tournaments are limited-time competitive events in which players strive to collect a special currency through varying methods, detailed within the event's rules accessible via an icon on the screen, to earn prizes and rewards based on milestones and final leaderboard positions. These events are designed to match players of similar levels, affecting the rewards available. Special events happen throughout the day in Monopoly GO! and can help boost your progress. events.name: Dig Minigame（Hello Kitty Treasures）
events.description: Treasure Hunt events in Monopoly GO! challenge players to dig for hidden treasures across multiple levels. Each level presents a grid where you'll use Pickaxes (earned through regular gameplay) to uncover valuable rewards. The strategic element comes from knowing the minimum number of pickaxes needed to guarantee finding all treasures on each level, helping you plan your approach and maximize your rewards efficiently. Here are the main rewards you can earn throughout this treasure hunt: Complete breakdown of every level, including grid size, minimum pickaxes needed, and completion rewards:

events.description: Treasure Hunt events in Monopoly GO! challenge players to dig for hidden treasures across multiple levels. Each level presents a grid where you'll use Pickaxes (earned through regular gameplay) to uncover valuable rewards. The strategic element comes from knowing the minimum number of pickaxes needed to guarantee finding all treasures on each level, helping you plan your approach and maximize your rewards efficiently. events.source_post_title: Monopoly GO! "Monopoly Ever After" Album: Everything You Need to Know
events.name: Monopoly Ever After
events.description: A brand new chapter is about to begin in Monopoly GO!, and this time it’s straight out of a storybook. Monopoly Ever After is the next sticker album, running from April 8th through June 3rd , and it brings a full fairytale theme to the game. Players can expect 24 unique sticker sets inspired by classic stories like Cinderella , Pinocchio , Little Red Riding Hood , and more - along with new features, updated events, and some of the biggest rewards we’ve seen yet.\ At the core of the season is the Monopoly Ever After album , which includes 24 sticker sets packed with familiar characters, magical
events.article_summary: A brand new chapter is about to begin in Monopoly GO!, and this time it’s straight out of a storybook. Monopoly Ever After is the next sticker album, running from April 8th through June 3rd , and it brings a full fairytale theme to the game. Players can expect 24 unique sticker sets inspired by classic stories like Cinderella , Pinocchio , Little Red Riding Hood , and more - along with new features, updated events, and some of the biggest rewards we’ve seen yet.\ At the core of the season is the Monopoly Ever After album , which includes 24 sticker sets packed with familiar characters, magical

events.name: Free Parking
events.description: Tournaments are limited-time competitive events in which players strive to collect a special currency through varying methods, detailed within the event's rules accessible via an icon on the screen, to earn prizes and rewards based on milestones and final leaderboard positions. These events are designed to match players of similar levels, affecting the rewards available. Special events happen throughout the day in Monopoly GO! and can help boost your progress. events.name: Partner Event（Fairytale Partners）
events.description: For those new to the game, Partner Events are exclusive to players who have advanced to Board 5 or higher. These events encourage collaborative play, where participants work together to build attractions and earn amazing rewards. You'll use Event tokens (like macarons during past Baking Events) to spin a special wheel, progressing a shared goal. These tokens, which you collect through regular gameplay, are essential for your active involvement. Complete all attractions with your partner to unlock these amazing rewards! events.name: Dig Minigame（Beanstalk Treasures）
events.description: Treasure Hunt events in Monopoly GO! challenge players to dig for hidden treasures across multiple levels. Each level presents a grid where you'll use Pickaxes (earned through regular gameplay) to uncover valuable rewards. The strategic element comes from knowing the minimum number of pickaxes needed to guarantee finding all treasures on each level, helping you plan your approach and maximize your rewards efficiently.
